key_signals: TPO and structure stay bullish: active 4h value is 2112.97-2121.82, daily price is accepted above daily TPO VAH 2112.18, and price remains above 7d AVWAP 2069.78.

Higher-timeframe participation is supportive: the last three 4h futures CVD deltas are +35591.62, +38337.32 and +13784.70; 4h whale delta notional is +27352005.81 and 1d whale delta notional is +182122213.82.
Overhead supply is active just above current price: buying exhaustion confirmed at 2118.49 and bearish absorption printed at 2120.04.
Dip support has also been defended: selling exhaustion printed at 2106.75 and 2107.21, while bullish absorption printed at 2113.13 and 2113.65.
VPIN is only medium and not extreme at 0.6248096, so the tape is contested rather than in a one-way toxic blowoff.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: ETHUSDT is in a higher-timeframe bullish auction with a short-term pause. On 1d, the sequence of closes remains higher, price is above the 7d AVWAP 2069.78 and HTF EMAs, daily TPO shows acceptance above 2112.18, and 1d whales plus footprint remain net bid. On 4h, the structure is still bullish: recent 4h candles stair-step higher, price is above 4h RVWAP 2114.97, the last three 4h futures CVD deltas are +35591.62, +38337.32 and +13784.70, 4h whale delta is +27352005.81, and the 4h TPO POC has migrated up to 2118.54. The 15m is the pause: price is rotating around the 15m POC 2117.66 inside 2116.82-2118.84 value, the latest 15m futures delta is -2245.97, 15m whale delta is -1363342.37, buying exhaustion fired at 2118.49, and bearish absorption printed at 2120.04. Those local bearish flow signals are being offset by bullish absorption at 2113.13 and 2113.65, selling exhaustion at 2106.75 and 2107.21, and positive depth skew (overall OBI 0.475; 15m OFI_norm_fut 1.44). The main higher-timeframe contradiction is that price is already near daily VAH 2120.99 and the 1d +2σ RVWAP band 2125.01, so the bull trend is extended rather than fresh. Net: dominant bias stays bullish, but current execution is a consolidation under the 2121-2125 overhead zone instead of a clean 15m impulse.
